app.title: My Love Manifestation
app.explanation: LovLov creates manifestation videos to help you attract love and create your reality

signup.phoneDesc: Enter your number to receive your manifestations
signup.partnerPhotoHint: If you have a photo of the person you want to manifest
signup.completeDesc: Your account is ready. Create your first love manifestation.

create.title: My manifestation
create.chooseMode: How do you want to create?
create.modeWriteDesc: Describe precisely what you want to see come true
create.modeAutoDesc: Give some indications and let the magic happen
create.scenarioPlaceholder: Describe your vision... What do you want to manifest?
create.indicationPlaceholder:
Tell us what you want to see in the video and what you definitely don't want.

Ex: It takes place in Paris but definitely not in the subway ;-)

purposes.love: Show my partner I love them

preview.generatingDesc: Creation takes about 20 minutes. You'll receive an SMS when it's ready!
preview.generatingTip: In the meantime, visualize what you want to manifest...
preview.whatToDo: What would you like to do?
preview.sendToSomeoneHint: Share your manifestation by email or SMS
preview.sentDesc: {{name}} will receive your manifestation very soon
preview.keptDesc: Your manifestation video is ready to attract love into your life

viewer.purposeManifest: created a manifestation video to meet you
viewer.purposeSeduce: created a manifestation video to seduce you
viewer.purposeLove: created a manifestation video to prove their love
viewer.whatToDo: What would you like to do?
viewer.replyFreeMessage: Reply for free with a message
viewer.replyFreeVideo: Reply for free with a video
viewer.createOwnHint: You can send it to anyone you want
viewer.messageSentDesc: {{name}} will receive your message very soon
viewer.signupEncourage: Want to create your own manifestation video? For yourself or someone else?

gift.replyTitle: What would you like to do?
